data.body:
Created REMEDIATION EPIC 6f2d-4221-26de-48cc (P1, relates_to a88f/5fd2/9da1; check-ac pass, clarity 7). Scope-capture epic (brainstorm-first, deep dive in a new session). Workstreams: WS-DOC (docs/workflow-engine.md incl 3-tier gating pattern), WS-MIGRATE (all LLM functionality onto the engine — verify_completion NOT yet migrated; 5fd2 currently bespoke; fan-out vs thin-linear-executor caveat), WS-PROMPTS (plan-review criteria_v*.json -> engine prompt-library/resolve_prompt/eval seam), WS-VISUAL (bidirectional visual editing via an ESTABLISHED ecosystem/format — NOT a bespoke canvas; BPMN/n8n/Node-RED/Argo/draw.io candidates), WS-VALIDATE (capabilities vs Langflow/Burr/Temporal/Prefect/Dagster/LangGraph/n8n/Argo), WS-VISUAL-EVAL (candidate: first-class visual prompt+eval-status review; Langfuse today is optional trace+prompt UI only), WS-INTENT-ALIGN (NOT now: orchestrator locates the a88f DESIGN session log — candidate 2eb5 — to align built-vs-intent on visual editing).

Captured concerns: process failure (core req silently deferred); REVIEW-GATE BLIND SPOT — gates check the plan AS WRITTEN (COH/G3/E3) and cannot catch silent descoping of an EXTERNALLY-expressed user requirement never written into goal/ACs; goal<->AC catches only a broad-goal-vs-carveout-AC tension (would partially catch completion_verifier 'migrate all but X', would NOT catch visual-editing where the goal was already narrowed to read-only). Candidate new plan-review criterion 'intent-source fidelity' (compare plan vs the linked design log). 

Q&A for user: prompt storage MISALIGNED (criteria JSON in docs/experiments vs engine prompt-library); visual prompt/eval review PARTIAL (Langfuse optional UI + Inspect/promptfoo viewers, not first-class). Both folded into the epic.
